Add/Drop of GE1401 University English

According to the study plan of different programmes, GE1401 will be pre-registered in the students' schedules when their personal schedules are released in each semester/term. Such pre-registered courses should not be dropped by students.

I. For Students Pre-registered in GE1401

Changing to another GE1401 section
Students who wish to change their pre-registered tutorial section of GE1401 may drop the original section and add the new section at the same time by submitting an add/drop request via AIMS.

Dropping GE1401
Students can only drop their pre-registered GE1401 section under very exceptional circumstances, and to do this they are required to submit a paper add/drop form; any request to drop the course needs to be approved by the Department of English. This form should be submitted to the following address within the add/drop period:

Department of English, M8100, Level 8, Run Run Shaw Creative Media Centre

II. For Students NOT Pre-registered in GE1401

Adding/Dropping GE1401
Students who have not been pre-registered in GE1401 may add/drop the course during the web add/drop period. However, they have to add/drop a specific section 'A02' (CRN: 13918) together with the GE1401 section that they wish to add/drop. This is required by the system for administrative purposes.
